CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2018 Continued To Jan-29-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action - Minor
Off Calendar Oct-25-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action Claim of the Minor, Florentino Paz.
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Jennifer L. Fiore, Esq. appeared with petitioner Lorina Dealba, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Florentino Paz, who was also present at this morning's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and testified.
Darius Hanneman, petitioner's husband, was also present, placed under oath but did not testify.
Order appointing Ms. Dealba Guardian ad Litem for the minor was filed on May 17, 2017.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $200,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $50,000.00.
Medical Bills/Liens - $11,604.91.
Costs - $7,365.59.

The net balance of $131,029.50 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Chase Bank, Stonestown Galleria Branch, located at 265 Winston Drive, Suite A, San Francisco, CA 94132. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of the Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to December 13, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the Status of the deposit of money into a Blocked Account.
